mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement: Where you deserve more than just interest rates!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this. I stroll into the Bank of Entitlement, naturally expecting red carpets and fanfare. Only, I see no red carpets, no fanfare-just some bland tellers. I nearly lost it! But fear not, my friends, for Hot Josh never settles for less. I promptly demanded a personal bank teller to cater to my every whim. And guess what? They complied! That's the power of entitlement, folks.
